title: polyscias waialealae
intro: Polyscias waialealae, also known as Waialeale holly or Waialeale tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polyscias waialealae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Polyscias waialealae can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
